tips.godClass: File with too many responsibilities (>500 LOC or >15 functions). Hard to maintain and test. Fix: split into smaller, focused classes.
tips.circularDep: Two or more modules importing each other in a cycle. Causes initialization issues and unnecessary coupling. Fix: extract shared dependency into a separate module.
tips.fatController: Controller with direct business logic (>200 LOC or accesses repositories without going through services). Fix: move logic to a service layer.
tips.excessiveCoupling: Module depending on more than 10 other modules (high fan-out). Indicates it does too much. Fix: decompose into smaller modules.
tips.complexity: Cyclomatic complexity: measures possible paths through a function (if, for, while, &&, ||, ternaries). >10 means the function is hard to test and maintain.
tips.coverage: Percentage of code lines covered by tests. Auto-detected from LCOV, Cobertura, Istanbul, or Go cover reports.
tips.antiPattern: Design pattern recognized as a problematic practice that hinders code maintainability, scalability, or readability.
tips.architecture: Architectural pattern detected based on layer distribution (Controller, Service, Repository, Model) and dependency flow between them.
tips.sqlInjection: Concatenation of user variables directly into SQL queries. Allows an attacker to execute arbitrary SQL commands. Fix: use parameterized queries.
tips.commandInjection: Passing user input to system command execution functions (exec, system, shell). Allows arbitrary code execution. Fix: validate and sanitize input.
tips.xss: Cross-Site Scripting: insertion of unsanitized HTML/JS into the DOM (innerHTML, dangerouslySetInnerHTML). Enables session hijacking. Fix: sanitize output or use textContent.
tips.ssrf: Server-Side Request Forgery: server makes HTTP requests using user-provided URLs. Allows accessing internal services. Fix: validate and restrict URLs.
tips.pathTraversal: Use of user-provided file paths without validation (../). Allows accessing files outside the expected directory. Fix: validate and normalize paths.
tips.hardcodedSecret: Credentials, tokens, or API keys written directly in source code. Risk of exposure if code is shared or published. Fix: use environment variables.
tips.insecureConfig: Configuration that weakens security: debug in production, CORS wildcard, binding to 0.0.0.0, missing .env.example. Fix: review config before deploying.
tips.riskScore: Risk score from 0-100 based on findings: critical=40pts, high=20pts, medium=5pts, low=1pt. Lower is better.
